feed.title: SAP Community - SAP BTP, ABAP environment
feed.subtitle: SAP BTP, ABAP environment Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Visual Filter in BTP RAP List Page App
entry.content:
Hi all,

i've created in the BTP ABAP Environment an RAP based List Report Application ( ODATA V4 ) and deployed it. Now i wan't to extend this app with the "Visual Filters" and implemented the coding like in the documentation descriped in the relevant CDS Views.

E.g. like here: https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/sdk/#/topic/653ed0f4f0d743dbb33ace4f68886c4e.html.

But for any reason the visual filter is not shown in the UI and I don't get any errors in the activation or display of the App.
Is there maybe a restriction that I'm not aware of? 

Thank you and best regards,

Patrick

entry.title: Adjustment of table xyz was aborted! Table xyz does not exist in the database
entry.content:
Hello, 

When I adjust table using quick fix on btp system I got an error and I couldn't adjust table. After that when I press the quick fix I can't see adjust table on list anymore. Just I can see continue adjustment of database table and this is not allowed, always get an error. 

Otherwise I can't delete same table because of error "xyz still being updated". How can I solve this problem?

entry.title: Enabling ATC / CVA on BTP
entry.content:
I am checking SAP blogs on how to enable ATC / CVA on SAP BTP so as to reduce the no of user licenses on SAP BTP. From both ADT and custom code migration app developer / lead should be able to check the code from  ECC  systems.

As we do not have S/4 HANA as a checked system I want to know if manual implementation is recommended or Automatic option ie enabling CIAS workflow.

Below is the blog that I am referring.

Usage of ABAP Test Cockpit (ATC) in the cloud for ... - SAP Community

Please let me know if the checked system is ECC(netweaver 750) which option is recommended and do we have a step by step tutorial guide for a beginner to enable ATC , CCM app on BTP. It is ok to follow the above blog?

Regards

Sweta Agarwal

 

 

 

 

Regards

Sweta Agarwal

entry.title: The Required Functional modules Knowledge.
entry.content:
Hello guys, Hope you're all good and doing well 💪

I want to know what is the required functional modules knowledge that any ABAP developer should know about to be able to communicate with the functional consultant in smooth way, achieve more accepted results and of course to be able to think about solutions in more effective way. 

Thanks.

entry.title: Unable to Calculate the Total Sum value In Decimals, Rounding issue
entry.content:
Hi, 
In one of the Standard routine added custom include, to achieve the Business requirement.
Some logic written. Requirement is for Fiori App. So, In backend Abap code written.
There is a Transaction document "Manage Solution Quotations" Abap code will trigger.
If document is having 6 lines. 6 times code will trigger and calculate the value and  
The result value will move into the Below Variable.
xkwert LIKE komv-kwert, (Condition Value)

Here(in the table) the logic is  A*B/C = D
In Normally if i calculate the logic in Excel Values are coming like D column 
But if it comes to coding Column E, Values are coming Bcz of Decimal 2 Variable is having.
if You observe both columns sum value D and E.. Rounding is missing At E Column.
Not able to Find the exact solution. Here in the code.. For every line(no of lines in the transaction) code will trigger. Suppose having 5 lines.. more than 5 times code will trigger and logic will execute bcz of standard routine.
Here 9999.98 value Standard code is calculating. Now issue is it should be Roud the value 10k
Some cases like 5k and 9k How can i achieve this one.

ABCDE
100003738098384.953799.3623799.36
10000236.3698384.9524.02424.02
10000253598384.95257.6614257.66
10000796.9598384.9581.0032481
10000796.9598384.9581.0032481
10000253598384.95257.6614257.66
10000253598384.95257.6614257.66
10000236.3698384.9524.02424.02
1000051333.3398384.955217.65217.6
   100009999.98

entry.title: Software Component (Partner Demo Development Tenant) Multitenancy SaaS Application
entry.content:
Hello Dear Experts,

I am trying to create a software component to develop multitenant SaaS products in the partner demo development system. However, I get an error like the one below.

SCLM(Software Component Lifecycle Management) application is not configured in the current business tenant

 

 https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/3530333

Resolution
TDD system (Partner Demo Development Tenant) is being used and in this tenant only predefined Software Components exist and other software components cannot be created:
 
  • Software Component ZPARTNER => Multi-Off Development
  • Software Component ZLOCAL => System Local Development which can not be transported or deployed


This is what SAP said about the error. In this case, we seem to be unable to create a software component, but is there a different way we can proceed? I wanted to ask you about something that can be done to create a software component.

Or do we need a different partner system so that we can create software components for our developments?

If we create a development package with the namespace we have previously registered in our partner development system and develop it with the ZPARTNER software component, will we have problems in the future when offering this product as a multitenant SaaS application? How should we proceed?

Reasons for Necessity:

Dear @FrankJentsch, your valuable comments and suggestions will make a great contribution. Thank you very much for your support.

entry.title: Add new Column in ME31K/ME32K Items -> Service Specifications (screen 400 of program SAPLMLSP)
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have an requirement to add new column in ME31K/ME32K -> Items -> Service Specifications table control.

How to use existing customer ESLL - fields USERF1_TXT, USERF2_TXT for this purpose?

if not possible then is there any other way other to add new column other than selecting  item ->Details', then to chose tab 'Other' on the of screen 0400 of program SAPLMLSP.

Anyone have an idea?

Thanks,

Arpita

entry.title: Principal propagation through AWS Application Load Balancer (ALB)
entry.content:
Hello,

Can you please help in answering the following questions.

  1. The prerequisites mention that for identity propagation, mutual authentication (mTLS) is mandatory, then how is the case 1 of SAP note 3482634 applicable when mtls is disabled on the load balancer.
  2. "As per SAP note 3482634, If SAP Cloud Connector version is lower than 2.17.0, we need to disable ECDHE, DHE ciphersuites using property jdk.tls.disabledAlgorithms in file $JAVA_HOME/jre/lib/security/java.security (on unix/linux). Can you please help me understand why this is required?" 

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: /sdf/mon: About the difference between allocated and attached
entry.content:
Question in Japanese version:

Tr-cd:/n/sdf/smonで確認できる、Snapshot Monitorにて、
Ext. Mem. allocated
Ext. Mem. attached
の項目（列）がありますが、この２つの項目の違いがわかりません。

それぞれの項目の説明と、この２つの項目の違いを教えていただけますでしょうか。

Question in English version:

What's the difference about Ext. Mem. allocated and Ext. Mem. attached in SDF/SMON ?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Pass additional field from ERP to EWM while creating EGR in EWM . Could you please help.
entry.content: I want to pass additional field from ERP to EWM while creating EGR in EWM . Could you please help. I am calling /SPE/INB_EGR_CREATE from ERP to create EGR in EWM.

entry.title: Issue: Data Not Displaying on CDS Endpoint Despite Presence in HANA Table
entry.content:
The Issue:

While working with SAP S/4HANA or SAP Cloud Platform, I encountered an issue where data in the HANA database table is not visible via the CDS endpoint, despite the data being present and accessible directly from the HANA table.


Here's a summary of the issue:

  • The data exists in the HANA table (Attached an image below).
  • A CDS view is defined to expose the data via an OData endpoint.
  • The OData service is properly registered, and the metadata is available.
  • However, when consuming the OData service, no data is returned, even though it should be.

 

 

Troubleshooting Steps We Tried:

Here are the troubleshooting steps we attempted to resolve the issue:

  1. Clearing Cache and Restarting Services
  2. Reviewing the CDS View Definition
  3. Verifying Service Registration
  4. Checking User Authorization

Investigating HANA CLI Query Results

Seeking Help from the SAP Community:

As I have encountered this issue in my own project, I would like to reach out to the SAP community for assistance. If anyone has experienced this problem or has insights on what might be causing this discrepancy, your input would be greatly appreciated.


I would love to hear from anyone in the SAP community who has encountered this issue before. Please share your insights, troubleshooting tips, or solutions to help resolve this issue. Your input will be invaluable in understanding and overcoming this challenge.

SAP Community

Node.js 

SAP HANA Cloud 

SAP HANA service for SAP BTP

entry.title: How to view or access CPI Audit Logs?
entry.content:
Hi CPI/BTP Experts,

I am currently trying to access the CPI Audit Log but cannot let it appear under my subscriptions.

My friend was able to show me a sample screenshot below of what it looks like:

 

Are the sap notes correct or event relevant?

3463319 - How to view IAS audit logs in Audit Log Viewer
3298228 - How to access SAP Audit Log Viewer Service

 

Let me know if I am looking at the correct notes, if not, let me know what the most relevant note is.

Thanks,

newcloudguy

entry.title: Second DEV Environment in SAP BTP
entry.content:
Hi all,

I want to create a second CF Space in a subaccount to develop a second version of our Apps, which we are publishing via SAP Build Work Zone to a Launchpad. Background while we are planning this like that, we want a stable version of our apps in production. In Case of an incident we want to be able to develop a fix for this stable version. Furthermore we want to develope a new version with much more features.

We are using SAP BTP ABAP Environment and RAP to develop our "Backend" Fiori Apps.

So my question:

I noticed that SAP Build Workzone in Space independent. Is there any Problem to use Apps with the same ID from different CF Spaces in another SAP Build Workzone Launchpad?

SAP BTP, Cloud Foundry runtime and environment SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition

entry.title: LEAVE TO SCREEN 0 AFTER REFRESH ALV IS NOT WORKING
entry.content:
Hello everyone, it is the first time that I post in this community, and I hope I am doing it well.... I need some suggestion to solve a problem with an ABAP code, the detail is that I have an ALV that shows a list of data, and when I insert a new record, I call again to the routine so that the ALV shows the updated information, up to here everything works perfectly; but when pressing the back button, it does not return to the main page, but it loads again the previous screen, and it is reiterative according to the amount of operations that I make in the program. I have already tried making the adjustments in the User Command with the code LEAVE TO SCREEN 0, but it does not work... I hope you can help me...Here is my code...Thanks..!!!

 

FORM RECOVER_DATA.

  IMPORT gv_list    = gv_list FROM MEMORY ID 'F4_LIST'.
  IMPORT gv_module  = gv_module FROM MEMORY ID 'F4_MODULE'.

  CLEAR: tt_rdata[].
    ObjBenMto->GetMateriales(
      EXPORTING
        p_prm1 = p_lgort
        p_prm2 = gv_list
        p_prm3 = gv_module
      IMPORTING
        rtdat = tt_rdata ).

  " Calling the form to build the field catalog
  PERFORM BUILD_FIELDCAT USING lt_fieldcat.

ENDFORM.

FORM BUILD_FIELDCAT USING lt_fieldcat TYPE lvc_t_fcat.

  " Build the fieldcat for the ALV
  " ...
  " ..
  " .
  
  PERFORM PRINT_ALV.

ENDFORM.

FORM PRINT_ALV.

  ls_layout-zebra      = abap_true.
  ls_layout-cwidth_opt = abap_true.
  ls_layout-box_fname  = 'MANDT'.

  " Mostrar los datos en la grilla ALV
  CALL FUNCTION 'REUSE_ALV_GRID_DISPLAY_LVC'
    EXPORTING
      i_structure_name          = 'TI_ALV'
      is_layout_lvc             = ls_layout
      it_fieldcat_lvc           = lt_fieldcat
      i_callback_program        = sy-repid
      i_callback_pf_status_set  = 'SET_STATUS_CABECERA'
      i_callback_user_command   = 'USER_COMMAND_CABECERA'
    TABLES
      t_outtab                  = tt_rdata
    EXCEPTIONS
      program_error             = 1
      OTHERS                    = 2.

  IF sy-subrc <> 0.
    MESSAGE 'Error when processing the information' TYPE 'E'.
  ENDIF.

ENDFORM.

FORM USER_COMMAND_CABECERA USING  pi_ucomm        TYPE sy-ucomm
                                  pi_wa_selfield  TYPE slis_selfield.

  CASE pi_ucomm.
    WHEN '&NEW'.  "New record
      CLEAR: txt_proc, txt_tipproc, txt_grupo, txt_material.
      IMPORT  gv_list_valor = gv_list_valor
              gv_list       = gv_list
              gv_id_item    = gv_id_item FROM MEMORY ID 'F4_LIST'.
      txt_almorigen = gv_lgort.
      txt_proc      = gv_list_valor.
      gv_list_valor = gv_list_valor.
      gv_list       = gv_list.
      gv_id_item    = gv_id_item.

      CALL SCREEN 1001  STARTING AT 10 5
                        ENDING AT 80 21.

    WHEN '&UPD'.  "Update record
      gv_id_item    = gv_id_item.

      PERFORM GET_ROWLIST USING pi_wa_selfield-tabindex.

      CALL SCREEN 1002  STARTING AT 10 5
                        ENDING AT 100 21.

    WHEN '&DEL'.  "Eliminar Registro

      PERFORM DELETE_DATA USING pi_wa_selfield-tabindex.

    WHEN '&LOA'.  "Upload xls
      CLEAR: txt_file.
      IMPORT  gv_list_valor = gv_list_valor
              gv_list       = gv_list FROM MEMORY ID 'F4_LIST'.
      txt_almorigenx  = gv_lgort.
      txt_listax      = gv_list_valor.
      gv_list_valor   = gv_list_valor.
      gv_list         = gv_list.
      gv_id_item      = gv_id_item.

      CALL SCREEN 1003  STARTING AT 10 5
                        ENDING AT 80 17.

    WHEN '&F03'. " Back
      SET SCREEN 0.
  ENDCASE.

  pi_wa_selfield-refresh    = 'X'.
  pi_wa_selfield-row_stable = 'X'.
  pi_wa_selfield-col_stable = 'X'.
  pi_wa_selfield-exit       = 'X'.

ENDFORM.

FORM NEW_DATA USING ptxt_almorigen  TYPE ZBI_BEN_S02-ALMORIGEN
                    ptxt_proc       TYPE ZBI_BEN_S01H-IDITEM
                    ptxt_tipproc    TYPE ZBI_BEN_S01D-VALORITEM
                    ptxt_grupo      TYPE ZBI_BEN_S02-GRUPO
                    ptxt_material   TYPE MAKT-MAKTX.

  DATA:   rv_cod      TYPE INT4,
          rv_msg      TYPE STRING,
          gv_msg      TYPE STRING.

  CLEAR: rv_cod, rv_msg, gv_msg.

  " User upload confirmation dialog box for upload confirmation
  CALL FUNCTION 'POPUP_TO_CONFIRM'
    EXPORTING
      titlebar      = 'New Record'
      text_question = '¿Are you sure to create the record?'
      text_button_1 = 'YES'
      icon_button_1 = 'ICON_OKAY'
      text_button_2 = 'NO'
      icon_button_2 = 'ICON_CANCEL'
    IMPORTING
      answer        = v_ans.

  IF v_ans NE 'A'.
    IF v_ans EQ '1'.
      ObjBenMto->NewData(
        EXPORTING
          p_prm1 = ptxt_almorigen
          p_prm2 = ptxt_proc
          p_prm3 = ptxt_tipproc
          p_prm4 = ptxt_material
          p_prm5 = ptxt_grupo
        IMPORTING
          lv_cod = rv_cod
          lv_msg = rv_msg ).

        IF rv_cod EQ 1.
          COMMIT WORK.
          MESSAGE rv_msg TYPE 'I'.
          PERFORM RECOVER_DATA. " Calling the Form to update the data from the ALV
        ELSE.
          ROLLBACK WORK.
          MESSAGE rv_msg TYPE 'I'.
        ENDIF.
    ELSE.
      ROLLBACK WORK.
    ENDIF.
  ELSE.
    ROLLBACK WORK.
    MESSAGE 'Process canceled by user' TYPE 'I'.
  ENDIF.

ENDFORM.

entry.title: API integration for PLANT master data
entry.content:
Hi gurus, hope all are doing good.

We have new integration project to integrate SAP with PROCOL. The requirement in front of me now is
to create API (ODATA) so that the user can CREATE (POST Method) and UPDATE ( PUT Method ) can be used
for PLANT Master Data. After doing some research I have found that like the way we have BAPI_MATERIAL_SAVE_DATA for material master
we don't have any such BAPI for PLANT master data.
How can I achieve functionality of creating API (ODATA)  for plant master data ?

entry.title: APIs for Warehousing - OData v4. Count Physical Inventory issue.
entry.content:
Hi, 

I am using the Physical Inventory API in my BTP Application and want to perform the COUNT as described in the link. Unfortunately, I am having some troubles with it, therefore I want to understand how it is supposed to work.

To be able to perform an Inventory COUNT I have to have a Inventory Document, which I created in my SAP EWM System as we can see below.

I notice that there exists a Physical Inventory Item ( Header Item ) for this document, but no Count Item ( since I did not perform the count yet ).

To perform the COUNT I implemented the BATCH call as mentioned in the Dokumentation and when I am executing it, I get following error:

"This physical inventory item doesn't exist."

This lead to my question: 

Since the BATCH call requires this two PUT calls in it.

How can the BATCH call require a PUT request of the Physical Inventory Count Item, if the Item does not exists yet?

entry.title: Acquiring Core ABAP Skills - /LRN/... courses
entry.content:
Hello,

I am taking 'Acquiring Core ABAP Skills' course at the moment.
I can't find /LRN/.. courses.
I checked the following posts:
https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-learning-q-a/acquiring-core-abap-skills-solutions-and-templates-name/qaq-p/1374739
https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-learning-q-a/query-related-learning-hub-course-acquiring-core-abap-skills/qaq-p/13687682
I tried using various search terms, but didn't help.
Any idea is appreciated.

Thanks
Laszlo

entry.title: SAP BTP - Applying Major Updates on Non-Production Subaccount
entry.content:
Hi all,

This is about the Major / Minor Updates / Upgrades that SAP provides on every month / quarterly basis. In order to have a better control and effectively manage the impact of this changes, can you please guide me on the below questions:

* Is there a way to apply the Updates / Releases on Non-Production Subaccount before the scheduled release date?

* Is there  a way to delay a release ? How to notify this to SAP?

entry.title: SAP BTP - Applying Major Updates on Non-Production Subaccount
entry.content:
Hi all,

This is about the Major / Minor Updates / Upgrades that SAP provides on every month / quarterly basis. In order to have a better control and effectively manage the impact of this changes, can you please guide me on the below questions:

* Is there a way to apply the Updates / Releases on Non-Production Subaccount before the scheduled release date?

* Is there  a way to delay a release ? How to notify this to SAP?

entry.title: Run NodeJS app locally using destination and connectivity services
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

lately I have been trying to create a NodeJS app using NestJS and the SAP Cloud SDK for javascript and deploy it to the cloud foundry runtime according to this example: https://github.com/SAP-samples/cloud-sdk-js?tab=readme-ov-file

I created a new service, generated the odata client using an edmx file of our on premise service and deployed it. 

The deployed version is fine: I can read data and consume the odata service. 
In local mode the destination fails. 

I found this blogpost telling me how to check the connectivity of my destination. 
Using the curl request results in this:

 

curl -v -i "<destinationName>.dest/sap/opu/odata/iwfnd/catalogservice;v=2/ServiceCollection?%24top=1"
* Uses proxy env variable no_proxy == 'localhost,127.0.0.1,github.com,.github.com,.npmjs.org,.yarnpkg.com,npm.sap.com,.maven.apache.org,.repo-cache.svc.cluster.local'
* Uses proxy env variable http_proxy == 'http://127.0.0.1:8887'
*   Trying 127.0.0.1:8887...
* Connected to 127.0.0.1 (127.0.0.1) port 8887 (#0)
> GET http://<destinationName>.dest/sap/opu/odata/iwfnd/catalogservice;v=2/ServiceCollection?%24top=1 HTTP/1.1
> Host: sd_orca_sap_ecc_akab.dest
> User-Agent: curl/7.88.1
> Accept: */*
> Proxy-Connection: Keep-Alive
> 
< HTTP/1.1 500 Internal Server Error
HTTP/1.1 500 Internal Server Error
< Content-Type: text/plain; charset=utf-8
Content-Type: text/plain; charset=utf-8
< X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff
X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff
< Date: Thu, 16 Jan 2025 17:10:28 GMT
Date: Thu, 16 Jan 2025 17:10:28 GMT
< Content-Length: 75
Content-Length: 75

< 
dial tcp: lookup <destinationName>.dest on 100.64.0.10:53: no such host
* Connection #0 to host 127.0.0.1 left intact

 

I also created a .env file that should change the proxy settings:

destinations="[{"name": "<destinationName>","url": "http://<destinationName>.dest","proxyConfiguration":{"host": "127.0.0.1","port": 8887,"protocol":"http"}}]"

 

My destination looks like this:

The destination is created on subaccount level. 
After changing the destination i also called the reload request Andre mentioned in his blogpost.

My default-env.json and default-services.json files both contain the configuration to the destination, connectivity and xsuaa service I created for the app. The variables are created using the cf env myapp > .env command. 
I am quite sure the service is found. Removing the destination service from these files results in another error: "Could not find service binding of type 'destination'".

 

At this point I am very desperate in trying to start my app locally. 

Any help is appreciated, thank you already in advance!
